falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes below 4000 (a key support level identified in the bottom_2024_aug pattern) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a breakdown in the expected support level, contradicting the pattern's assumption of a bullish reversal and invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average trading volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 20 billion shares (a 50% increase from current levels) with no corresponding price increase
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Excessive volume without price movement would suggest a lack of conviction in the current pattern, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict by showing unsustainable market dynamics.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 200-day moving average of the S&P 500 crosses below the 50-day moving average (confirming a bearish trend) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This technical indicator failure would directly contradict the bottom_2024_aug pattern's expectation of a bullish trend, falsifying the current HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
